name: Rugelach/Fanny Farmer
recipeInstructions:
Combine the butter and cream cheese and beat until well mixed. Add the flour and salt, and mix until completely blended. The dough will be easier to handle if you wrap and chill it for about an hour. Stir together 1/2 cup of sugar and cinnamon. Add raisins and nuts and toss to coat all pieces.
Preheat oven to 375°F. Prepare a heavy baking sheet. Divide the dough into six equal portions. Keep any unused dough chilled. Roll one portion into an 8-inch circle. Spread with 2 tablespoons jam and sprinkle with 2 tablespoons of sugar-raisin-nut mixture. Cut into 8 pie-shaped wedges.
Starting at the wide end, roll toward the point to form a crescent shape. Form remaining dough similarly. Place cookies, point sides down, about 1 inch apart on ungreased baking sheets. Brush each cookie with egg yolk and water mixture. Sprinkle lightly with remaining sugar. Bake for about 15 minutes or until lightly golden. Remove from oven and transfer to racks to cool.
